title: tragacantha sphaerocalyx
intro: Tragacantha sphaerocalyx, also known as the globe thistle or ballhead thistle, is a perennial plant in the aster family native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha sphaerocalyx include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Tragacantha sphaerocalyx can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers and leaves can be used to make a medicinal infusion or added to salads for their potential health benefits.
